channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Amazon just quietly dropped prices even further on Razer gaming peripherals — here are 9 unmissable deals with 40% or more off
item.description: I've scoured the Amazon Spring Sale for the best Razer gaming deals.

item.title: Le DJI Mini 3, petit drone 4K, voit son prix chuter pendant les Ventes Flash d’Amazon
item.description: Amateurs de belles images aériennes, c’est le moment de craquer ! Pendant les Ventes Flash d’Amazon, le DJI Mini 3 voit son prix fondre à seulement 266 €, contre 379 € habituellement. Léger, facile à piloter et capable de filmer en 4K, ce petit drone devient une vraie affaire.

item.title: I love the MacBook Neo and its wild colors — but Apple missed a big trick with the iPhone 17e
item.description: Apple ripped up the budget rulebook with the MacBook Neo, but I think it missed a trick in the color department.

item.title: I now only use SteelSeries headsets — and it looks like every single one of my favourites is discounted in Amazon's Spring Sale
item.description: From a value-busting wired set to one of my all-time high-end favourites, almost all of SteelSeries' gaming headsets are discounted right now.

item.title: Google’s Smart Glasses Can Create Fake Photos on the Fly
item.description: Who needs real memories anymore?

item.title: The best Beats headphones you can buy are over 50% off right now at Amazon — get them while you can
item.description: The Beats Studio Pro are the best Beats headphones you can buy, and Amazon has a massive 51% discount, bringing the price down to $169.95.

item.title: Major SocksEscort proxy network powered by Linux malware taken down by FBI and other police forces
item.description: The 15-year-old malicious network was finally taken down, servers and domains were seized.

item.title: The R2 is nearly here — can Rivian stick the landing?
item.description: On Thursday, Rivian revealed its most important vehicle to date: the R2, a midsize SUV that eventually will start at under $50,000. As a distinctive EV with an attractive sticker price, the R2 is designed to take Rivian to the next level. In fact, the company is banking on it. If they succeed, then Rivian […]

item.title: Pour calmer Bruxelles, X propose des changements sur les badges bleus
item.description: X, anciennement Twitter, a proposé des changements pour régler le problème des badges bleus payants soulevé par la Commission européenne. Cette histoire avait débouché sur la première sanction financière contre une entreprise, en l'occurrence le réseau social d'Elon Musk, dans le cadre du règlement sur les marchés numériques. Et provoqué au passage une belle pagaille dans les relations transatlantiques....

item.title: The Pixel Buds Pro 2 are some of the best wireless earbuds $170 can buy
item.description: I upgraded from the Pixel A-series buds released in 2021 to the Pixel Buds Pro 2, and two things were immediately apparent: the A-series buds have no business sounding so good for their sub-$100 price, and the Pixel Buds Pro 2 were everything I wanted in a successor. They’re even smaller and have a silicone […]

item.title: Apple drops commission rates in China without a fuss
item.description: Apple dropped its App Store commission rates to 25% in China, and commissions on auto-renewed subscriptions down to 12%.

item.title: Rebuilding trust in AI with responsible adoption
item.description: AI could drive growth, but confidence in the technology is eroding.

item.title: OLED ou Mini-LED : quel écran PC choisir en 2026 (et comment le payer beaucoup moins cher) ? [Sponso]
item.description: Les écrans OLED et Mini LED se démocratisent sur PC, mais nécessitent bien souvent un budget conséquent. Heureusement, des revendeurs comme PcComponentes permettent de profiter des nombreux avantages de ces technologies à prix réduits.

item.title: How to clean and organize your Mac
item.description: Inevitably, the more you use something — your Mac included — the more dirty and cluttered it’s likely to become. At that point, you can buy a new machine, but the more economical move is to make what you have already work better. To help your computer feel new, or at least a little cleaner and less chaotic, we put together this guide with techniques and useful apps that have helped us maintain a more organized computer. I’ve been using these tips since before I first published this guide in 2021, and they’ve helped keep my 2018 MacBook Air looking and running (almost) like brand new. How to cl...

item.title: ‘The Vampire Lestat’ Will Sink Its Teeth Into You This Summer
item.description: The artist formerly known as 'Interview With the Vampire' will rock our socks off starting June 7.

item.title: The Iran War Is Throwing Global Shipping Into Chaos
item.description: Flexport CEO Ryan Petersen says the conflict is stranding cargo and threatening inflation.

item.title: The Madison review — Taylor Sheridan's emotional standalone series gets everything right that Marshals: A Yellowstone Story is getting wrong
item.description: While I've lost hope with Marshals: A Yellowstone Story, new standalone series The Madison has taken Taylor Sheridan back to Landman levels of glory.

item.title: Quordle hints and answers for Saturday, March 14 (game #1510)
item.description: Looking for Quordle clues? We can help. Plus get the answers to Quordle today and past solutions.

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Saturday, March 14 (game #741)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: 7 new movies and TV shows to watch on Netflix, Prime Video, HBO Max, and more this weekend (March 13)
item.description: From Zootopia 2 and One Piece season, to this year's Oscars ceremony there's lots to check out at home this weekend.

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Saturday, March 14 (game #1007)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: HP’s powerhouse workstations get a huge Spring Sale price cut - save over £500 on business-grade tower desktops with this code
item.description: HP’s Core i9-14900K-powered Z2 G9 Tower Workstation for creators and professionals gets a huge £528 Spring price cut.

item.title: The FBI is investigating malware hidden inside games hosted on Steam
item.description: The FBI believes a series of video games published on Steam in the last two years were embedded with malware by the same hacker.

item.title: Online scam centers in Cambodia targeted with new legislation setting hefty fines and prison time
item.description: Cambodia, a major hub for scam centers, vows to shut them down by the end of April. Cambodia said Friday it has drafted its first law targeting online scam centers, after vowing to shut them down by the end of April.Cambodia is a major hub for scam operations, which extort money from victims online through bogus investment schemes and feigned romances. Victims around the world are estimated to have been cheated out of tens of billions of dollars annually.At the same time, thousands of people, especially from other Asian nations, have been recruited with false job offers and then forced to work...

item.title: How to get 49 different Pokémon watch faces on your Garmin watch for free
item.description: A Garmin Venu-saur? Pokémon watch faces just dropped – here's how to get them (and which watches are compatible)

item.title: On a roulé une semaine en Segway E250S électrique : le compromis parfait pour fuir les bouchons en scooter sans casser la tirelire
item.description: Après un E125S tourné vers la ville et un E300SE taillé pour la performance, Segway lance le scooter électrique E250s. Ce nouveau venu se positionne comme le "juste milieu" en équivalent 125 cm³ : une vitesse de pointe de 90 km/h, un arsenal technologique complet et une agilité redoutable. Est-ce le compromis idéal pour quitter le centre-ville sans casser la tirelire ? Réponse dans notre essai complet. ...

item.title: Google paid over $17 million to bug hunters in 2025
item.description: Google paid out $17.1 million in bug bounties in 2025, the biggest year for payouts ever.

item.title: Great news for creators and professionals: Save $97 on AMD's Ryzen 5 9600X processor with boost speeds up to 5.4GHz
item.description: AMD Ryzen 5 9600X processor is just $182, a huge discount on a modern Zen 5 chip with 6 cores, 12 threads, and boost speeds up to 5.4GHz.

item.title: Russia’s crackdown on VPNs reaches new heights as internet restrictions intensify
item.description: Moscow has been rocked by a week-long mobile internet outage as authorities announce new plans to restrict Telegram and VPNs.

item.title: Les Pixel de Google perdent une option pratique avec leur dernière mise à jour
item.description: Le changement passera inaperçu chez beaucoup d'utilisateurs, mais si vous vous serviez régulièrement de la fonctionnalité désormais supprimée des Pixel, vous le verrez de suite.

item.title: L’Apple MacBook Neo peut faire tourner Windows 11, mais n’en attendez pas trop
item.description: Les développeurs de Parallels Desktop, un logiciel de virtualisation, confirment que le MacBook Neo est capable de supporter Windows 11.

item.title: La fin d’une ère : pourquoi la compilation des shaders vit ses derniers instants dans nos jeux PC
item.description: Microsoft s'associe aux géants du hardware pour éliminer la compilation des shaders et les saccades grâce à la technologie Advanced Shader Delivery. Auparavant réservée à la seule ROG Xbox Ally, elle arrive cette année pour tous les joueurs PC.

item.title: The Best Outdoor Deals from The REI Member Days Sale (2026)
item.description: REI's Member Days sale has deals on our favorite tents, backpacks, rain jackets and more gear to outfit you for summer.

item.title: Samsung Galaxy S26 review: The smartphone status quo
item.description:
It's already smartphone season. Samsung's annual deluge encompasses three new phones for 2026: the frontier-pushing S26 Ultra ($1,300) with its innovative Privacy Screen, the S26 ($899) and the S26+ ($999). The smaller flagships, yet again, are iterative versions of what came before, with the major differences centering on bigger batteries and brighter screens. I'm getting waves of deja vu as I review the Galaxy S26, because at times I was writing exactly what I wrote last year — including the part about it being a little too similar to what came before.
Hardware
Image by Mat Smith fo...

item.title: Resident Evil : Requiem est-il jouable en cloud gaming ? Notre test sur MacBook, Steam Deck et smartphone
item.description: La célèbre licence de survival-horror revient avec un neuvième opus canonique encore plus effrayant que ses prédécesseurs. Voyons ici si Resident Evil : Requiem est jouable correctement en cloud gaming sur MacBook, console portable et smartphone.

item.title: Le fameux casque Apple AirPods Max USB-C n’échappe pas aux promos Amazon pour titiller le Sony WH-1000XM6 sur son terrain
item.description: Malgré son nom au pluriel, les AirPods Max d'Apple sont bel et bien un casque au singulier que vous retrouvez en promo sur Amazon à 488 euros au lieu de 579 euros.

item.title: Epic says its Fortnite V-bucks price hike is a ‘direct correlation’ to operating costs
item.description: Epic Games announced this week that Fortnite's in-game V-bucks currency would be getting more expensive with a somewhat glib statement: "The cost of running Fortnite has gone up a lot and we're raising prices to help pay the bills," the company wrote. The price hike will go into effect on March 19th, the same day […]

item.title: Peacock is adding an AI Andy Cohen to narrate an endless stream of Bravo clips
item.description: When you open your Peacock mobile app this summer, you might see a portal leading to the AI likeness of TV host Andy Cohen on your homepage. In an announcement on Friday, NBCUniversal said Cohen's avatar will serve as a guide through Peacock's "infinitely swipeable" feed of clips from Bravo shows, like Love Island, The […]

item.title: Democrats warn Trump’s tariffs will cost American households more than $2,500 in 2026
item.description: The results of the study come at a time when consumers are already dealing with the war’s spike on energy prices. President Donald Trump is scrambling to replace the revenue the federal government lost when the Supreme Court struck down his biggest and boldest tariffs last month.If the effort succeeds, congressional Democrats warn in a study out Friday, the administration’s import taxes will cost American households an average of $2,512 in 2026, up 44% from $1,745 in tariff costs last year. And this at a time when U.S. consumers are already angry over the high cost of living and the war with ...

item.title: Crimson Desert finally gets PS5 Pro footage and 'overall performance across the three modes is impressive' but we're still waiting on PS5 and Xbox Series X footage
item.description: Crimson Desert launches next week for PC and consoles, and the first proper look at PlayStation 5 Pro footage has finally been revealed.

item.title: Quand la Chine le demande, Apple sait baisser la commission de l’App Store
item.description: Comme quoi, c'est possible : Apple a accepté sans barguigner d'abaisser sa commission sur les achats effectués dans l'App Store… en Chine. La baisse est relativement modeste, mais elle permettra aux développeurs de gagner un peu plus d'argent, et à Apple de lever la pression exercée par les régulateurs.

item.title: Our Sun Was Born in a Hellish Part of the Milky Way. New Research Explains How It Escaped
item.description: Without the mass stellar migration, life may not have been able to form on Earth.

item.title: Telus Digital confirms breach - hackers allegedly stole 'almost 1 petabyte of data'
item.description: ShinyHunters take the blame, saying they grabbed GCP credentials in the Salesloft Drift fiasco.

item.title: Engadget Podcast: Apple's $599 MacBook Neo is astounding
item.description: Somehow, Apple made a $599 laptop that's actually a joy to use. In this episode, Devindra and Deputy Editor Nathan Ingraham chat about what makes the MacBook Neo so great. And they also dive into the new M4 iPad Air, M5 MacBook Air and M5 Pro/Max MacBook Pros. Also, Roberto Baldwin, SAE International's Sustainability Editor, joins us to chat about the state of EVs today as gas prices explode.Subscribe!iTunesSpotifyPocket CastsStitcherGoogle PodcastsTopicMacBook Neo review: Apple puts $600 Windows PCs to shame – 1:47iPad Air M4 remains Apple’s best overall tablet – 18:05Whistleblower claims ex-...

item.title: ‘Scream 8’ Will Probably Happen, But Not With Kevin Williamson
item.description: The 'Scream' creator and 'Scream 7' director doesn't plan on returning to the world of Ghostface.

item.title: What Happens When You Put a LaserDisc Under a Microscope?
item.description: It turns out you can quite literally see an analog signal if the conditions are right—and you look closely enough.

item.title: Toss Your Not-Quite-Clean Clothes on Simone Giertz’s Laundry Chair
item.description: Inventor and YouTuber Simone Giertz built an elegant chair that holds your half-dirty clothes while still functioning as a seat.

item.title: Peacock’s NBA streams are going vertical
item.description: Peacock is rolling out a native vertical video format for live sports, allowing you to watch games without turning your phone sideways. The feature will roll out to NBA games first this spring and will use an algorithm to track players and zoom in on the action. The launch of this feature comes just months […]

item.title: Peacock expands into AI-driven video, mobile-first live sports, and gaming
item.description: Peacock is betting on new AI-powered video experiences, vertical clips, and mobile games to help its growth.

item.title: Voici la moins chère des voitures électriques de Leapmotor : les Renault 5 et Peugeot 208 peuvent trembler
item.description: Les premières images de la Leapmotor A05 viennent d'apparaître en Chine. Cette petite voiture électrique, rivale toute désignée des Renault 5 E-Tech et BYD Dolphin Surf, devrait en toute logique arriver en Europe avec des prix serrés.

item.title: Got ink? Chipotle is giving tattooed fans free food today — how to claim
item.description: On March 13, dine in at Chipotle from 3-4 p.m. local time and show off your tattoo to qualify for a BOGO deal.

item.title: 15 deals I’m eyeing in Walmart’s massive spring sale — patio furniture, grills, vacuums, and more from $29.99
item.description: Walmart's spring sale is live, and I'm rounding up the 15 deals that I'm adding to my cart, including patio furniture, grills, cleaning appliances, and more..
